summary: Iteration 5 testing for 7 user-requested modifications: (1) Stop button removed, (2) Next takt button removed, (3) Screen management replaced with URL copy, (4) Working hours display fixed using shift_organization.teams, (5) Takt slider 20-90 min, (6) Auto-start at day begin option, (7) Overtime display controlled by auto_resume_after_takt. Fixed TVDisplay.js missing Square import.
passed_tests: Dashboard: 'Écrans' button replaced with 'URL' copy button
Dashboard: Working hours display from shift_organization.teams (TRADY4: 06:00-21:00, XDD: 08:00-17:00)
Dashboard: Conditional button logic (auto_start enabled: shows 'Démarrage auto à XX:XX', disabled: shows Démarrer button)
LineConfig: 'Démarrage auto en début de journée' option exists in global options
LineConfig: Takt slider range 20-90 min with correct labels
LineConfig: All 3 global options visible (auto-start, auto-resume after break, auto-next)
TV Display: Working hours from shift_organization (06:00-21:00)
TV Display: Floating controls show 'Démarrage auto à 06:00' when auto_start enabled
API: auto_start_at_day_begin field persists and returns correctly
API: Takt duration 20 and 90 min accepted
API: All takt control endpoints working (start/pause/resume/next/stop)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: TVDisplay.js was missing Square import from lucide-react (line 24 referenced Square but it wasn't imported)
seed_data_creation: Used existing lines: TRADY 4 (06:00-21:00, 20min takt, auto_start=true) and XDD (08:00-17:00, 30min takt)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 user modifications have been verified and working. The Square import bug in TVDisplay.js was fixed. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_takt_api.py covers: API health, lines API, auto_start_at_day_begin persistence, takt duration range, auto_resume_after_takt, and takt controls. TRADY 4 has auto_start_at_day_begin=true for testing auto-start UI behavior.
